column1: Dataset Title: Arctic Vegetation Archive: Oxycocco-Sphagnetea mires in East European tundra Vegetation Plots
Dataset Author: Lavrinenko Olga, Lavrinenko Igor
Dataset Reference: Lavrinenko O.V., Lavrinenko I.A. Communities of the class Oxycocco-Sphagnetea Br.-Bl. Et R. Tx. 1943 in the East European tundras // Vegetation of Russia. 2015. N 26 P. 55–84.
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Oxycocco-Sphagnetea mires Vegetation Plots

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the new Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale: r (single), + (less than 1 percent), 1 (1 to 5 percent), 2a (6 to 12 percent), 2b (13 to 25 percent), 3 (26 to 50 percent), 4 (51 to 75 percent), and 5 (76 to 100 percent). Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
